plugins.name: kronen
plugins.description: The Crown — core foundation that all other plugins depend on. Planning, tracing, memory, orchestration, and governance.

plugins.name: smedjen
plugins.description: The Forge — development execution engine. Task decomposition, agent dispatch, tech knowledge, and completion gates.

plugins.description: The Herald — task management and workplace integration. Jira, Azure DevOps, Confluence, PR workflows, and QA handover.

plugins.description: The Coat of Arms — brand strategy toolkit. Voice, values, positioning, audience, and content pillars.

plugins.name: segl
